sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40088" key="e)piluga/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιλῠγάζω</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιλογ-λῠγαῖος</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιλογ-λῠγίζω</orth>, ff.ll. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐπηλ-</foreign>.</entryFree>
